title: Collies Tools
description: A fabric mod that Adds diffrent tools to the game!
body:
# What does it add
## Diffrent tools:
Axe(s), Sword(s), Pickaxe(s), Hoe(s) and Shovel(s)
## Few other items:
Ingot(s)

# Why would you download this mod
To get more tools to enhance your gameplay and fun
Maybe you are getting bored of the normal tools and you want something fresh to try out!

# Critical Information!

## Crafting recipes:

Elemental Ingot
![Elemental Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65c14d26908fe6a5390ac75aff88325782331a61.png)

To make the tools just use the normal recipes
